title: Alex's Caves x Cobblemon!
description: This datapack adds spawns to Alex's Cave biomes for Cobblemon!
body:
This comprehensive spawn datapack adds 247 carefully curated Pokemon spawns across all 6 biomes in Alex's Caves. Each biome has been meticulously themed with Pokemon that fit its unique atmosphere! Ranging from the electric Magnetic Caves to the prehistoric Primordial Caves and the eerie Forlorn Hollows! This pack was created for my up-coming Modpack "Cobblemon Side by Side!"
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-side-by-side

Features!

247 Pokemon across 6 fully populated biomes
22 Legendary/Mythical Pokemon (2-8 per biome)
Biome-specific mechanics - Abyssal Chasm features only underwater spawns, Toxic Caves only ground spawns
Themed encounters - Pokemon perfectly match each cave's atmosphere
Fossil Pokemon paradise - Primordial Caves features all fossil Pokemon
Mid-to-late game content - Pokemon levels range from 30-60
Electric & Steel specialists - Magnetic Caves features the largest legendary variety
Deep-sea exploration - Abyssal Chasm includes all Water-type starter finals

Perfect for: Modpack creators, server owners, and players who want a fully-featured Pokemon experience in Alex's Caves underground dimension!

All the spawns!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kPFab7zDGzpZrb6KB7-Hdf810q8XcOZHqmVPc_qfiUQ/edit?usp=sharing

</details>





Installation
Download the datapack
Place in world/datapacks or Open Loader's/Other datapack loaders data folder
Run /reload
Start exploring!

Requires: Cobblemon 1.6.1+ and Alex's Caves mod

Feel free to check out my other projects!

This project can also be found on Curseforge!

curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/alexs-caves-x-cobblemon
